review_title: Untangle is by far the best firewall you can get!
description: We love it and recommend all the time. We have moved clients from Sophos and Fortigate to Untangle, and they love it.
author: PAUL O.
pros: We love the fact that Untangle has products from a home user to enterprise companies. The flexibility is amazing, from getting an appliance, to being able to deploy it on a VM allows a lot of different companies to get the benefits.
cons: The interface is not intuitive for a user that has never used a piece of software like this before.

review_title: Simple and Effective
description: I have had a great experience with NG Firewall, we use it across multiple locations, and it is very reliable and easy to use.
author: Cade J.
pros: Ease of setup, multiple features all in one, not nearly as expensive as competitors.
cons: Some of the hardware appliances aren't the most reliable, and we have had to build custom machines to have the software run on.

review_title: A possible options with some advantages, but the costs add up for the modules.
description: I was evaluating this as a pfSense alternative, and it has some ease of use pros. Easier to install that is wizard based and with a graphical GUI. Easy to get going, and there is a 30 day evaluation for the paid modules. I can see this being a good fit for some uses.
author: Anton G.
pros: Very easy to install, with a decent web interface that allows for direct mouse/keyboard graphical browser use, as opposed to text-only console interfaces on other options.
cons: Cost. The modules that you'd need for any real deployment are not exactly cheap. Alternatives give you much more core, out-of-the-box functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Untangle NG Firewall a multi functional system for web interface
description: With many students on our campus I have been able to put my trust in the web filter that NG Firewall provides. Being able to control web searching, access, and the amount of time users spend on the internet i has proven to be highly valuable in my daily responsibilities. Your management will be completely amazed at the results that the system provides. The features are endless and the developers are constantly working to expand functionality as well as stay relevant to a ever changing technology industry.
author: Jeffrey B.
pros: The system has many features for example the ability to track web use within any organization from large, medium, to small. Imagine being able to see a extensive report on bandwidth usage. The report will allow you to see where your bandwidth is being chewed up as well as creating a policy to allocate how its parsed out to end users. System Administrators often battle latency on their networks this feature allows you to zero in and control the issue. The entire Untangle NG Firewall is very easy to deploy as well as manage, it has a very slick robust web portal called command center. Command center is exactly what its named. From the portal you have the ability to perform tasks like being able to remote into the NG Firwewall as well as check the system status and keep up to date on licensing. Its all there at your finger tips.
cons: Integration into a large school campus was flawless. You have the ability to bridge your firewall or let it handle any router functions with existing equipment. Untangle can be function as your main filter on in coming and outgoing network traffic, or it can sit behind your firewall and share in multiple networking tasks.

review_title: Great for small business
description: I have implemented it at my office as the primary UTM, testing it for installation at customer sites. The performance is very good, it will email you a detailed report every day. The protection is on par with competitors, but it is simpler to set up than many of them.
author: Bill B.
pros: Untangle is available in both free and paid versions. If you want an extra feature beyond basic firewalling, you can pay an annual fee for that feature. They offer a package of all the add-ons for much less than what it would cost to buy them separately, so if you are thinking about using the paid features, they have structured it so it just makes sense to get them all. Even so, the comprehensive bundle price is less than most other UTMs with actively managed security features. The free version does include some lite versions of things like the virus scanner and app control, and includes ad blocking, phishing detection and web monitoring for free. The interface is very easy compared to most UTMs, but you can still dig into the details to accomplish more sophisticated configurations. Even then the system is clearly laid out and easy to navigate.
cons: Like all web-based UIs, it takes a few clicks to get things done.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Net gen firewalls for complete security
description: It is an awsome experience, for administrators jus one time set up and you are good to go, rest monitoring is required.
author: Ishtiaq N.
pros: Ssl vpn Policy based routing. Wizard to easily set up rules. All the security bundles in a single package.
cons: Bug fixation takes a lot of time, this needs to be done on priority and patches should be released weekly with the complete blue print.

review_title: Great solution for Network Security, managing policies is pretty easy.
description: Overall this is an amazing firewall, I really enjoyed working on the UI, and it seems to be working pretty well. We can easily control the traffic by applying the firewall rules.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Really liked one simple dashboard, we can take a very quick glance looking at dashboard, and have summarized idea of what is happening. Dashboard for application visibility, top talkers are also great feature on its UI.
cons: We should have the ability to filter by user groups the login access on captive portal.

review_title: great solution!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Support is some of the best I've ever used, very responsive and knowledgable about advanced networking and their product in general, even at T1 support. I love that it can be installed on your own hardware or even a VM if you're feeling fancy. The features of the free version are great foa SOHO and the paid versions are relatively inexpensive if you'd like or need additional features or protection. The UI is intuitive and the oly problem I've had with them is when there's a hardware failure (not often, but at my peak I was managing upwards of 100 of them).
cons: I'm not a huge fan of their pricing model for SMBs. It's easy to be in the "in-between" and requres a lot of overhead; one must exclude MAC addresses of "bypassed devices" (think printers and the like) that will literally bypass the firewall, or they must pay for the higher license tier. Typically licenses like this are per user, seat, etc. - not per mac address.

review_title: Untangle / Arista Firewall
description: Great experience. very effective against attacks.
author: Arie B.
pros: Ease of use and installation and confdiguration
cons: Nothing negative to say about the product in general.

review_title: Don't overlook Untangle
description: The big thing with Untangle is the ease of use. We're a small I.T. operation so we're switching gears constantly. Untangle's interface is easy and intuitive enough that we can jump into it quickly and move on. We don't have to refer to notes to figure out how to do something complicated.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Untangle gets it...they do firewalling and do it very well. The product is very easy to use, that's it's big selling point.
cons: Historically they've been a little slower on the development side, features roll out behind the big guys.

review_title: Been a long time user of Untangle
description: My overall experience has been great, I have had to rely on tech support several time and was very happy with the service I received.
author: Gregg M.
pros: The best thing about Untangle that I tout to other IT people in our industry is the reporting. Untangle has extensive reporting abilities and is easily configurable to a large scenario of different needs. The granularity of the filtering ability is a very close second to the reporting. I have fine tuned my Untangle appliance to fit our very specific needs in the utility industry. I also really like the centralized management component . I have Untangle appliances in multiple places and I can manage them all from my desktop.
cons: I really tried to come up with something that I didn't like or something that I would like changed, but the more I use it the more I like it.

review_title: Feature Pack Solution For Non Profits
description: We purchased an appliance with Untangle included and it has been working for us without a hitch for the last 2 years, it gave our network better management and Untangle just keeps adding new features.
author: Uriel G.
pros: Untangle provides a very easy robust solution to manage your network, setting up VLANs, Site To Site VPNs, Internal DNS, and web/application filtering.
cons: Sometimes LT2P VPNs fail to connect but it might bedo to Windows 10, on Android there was no issues.

review_title: Strong Security
description: Overall, all monitor actions can be easily monitored in one place. Therefore, the dashboard that's installed in the software makes it way easier to manage the security policies.
author: SEBNEM V.
pros: I was amazed by the ease of use and rules implementation in this product. It's really good at preventing our organization from internal and external attacks.
cons: The only issue I've had with this product was the reporting tool so far. It can be enhanced.

review_title: Untangle UTM
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is one of the opensource UTM out there. I used this version for some time. Free version works as expected with certain services are limited. Setup is comparatively easier than other similar opensource UTM. In some areas Untangle has an edge over pfSense, ClearOS etc.
cons: I like to see a lower prices for the paid version.

review_title: Robust Firewall with a Moderate Cost
description: We moved from separate appliances/services for web filtering, VPN, and firewall into a single unit. Layer 7 traffic shaping and bandwidth control was a great added bonus.
author: Jonathon H.
pros: In addition to a standard Layer 3 and 7 firewall, Untangle also includes numerous VPN for site-to-site and client, extensive web content filtering, WAN failover and balancing, and many other applications. It is a one stop solution for most SMBs.
cons: The licensing can be pricey compared to competitors. Setting up HA Failover can be complicated.

review_title: Hard to beat for the price
description: Untangle gives you only what you need, when you need it. It is the best Gateway system out there for any over worked, understaffed IT Dept. Works out of the box in minutes...to as complex as you need it to be. Support is great too...very helpful when you can't afford to staff a Gateway admin.
author: michael H.
pros: Fast and easy to deploy...simple to use.
cons: Haven't really found one yet....except if you like command lines....you will not like this GUI

review_title: A great package of features for the price!
description: I needed a FW that could do some basic tasks and then apply more strict policies. I'm really happy with the interface/management, the learning curve does not seem to be too big.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This NG FW is really packing so much features! It has almost what every typical small/medium business would need. It's interface needs some time to understand, but you can configure your first policies and actions right away. It also has a lot of free features that are great in terms of security.
cons: Nothing so far, I'm really excited on what I've seen already.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product for youth serving organization
description: Overall very happy with our experience and anticipate continued use.
author: Kyle C.
pros: Multiple / different policies for different user groups utilizing a great web filter
cons: It can be so detailed and customized that its intimidating to learn everything and utilize full functionality.

review_title: GET THIS PRODUCT
author: Kaleb P.
pros: This is the easiest Firewall I have ever worked with. Untangle has made monitoring my network easy and convenient. Couldn't recommend it more.
cons: It took me a bit to get used to the interface, but once I did, it did WAAAY more than I thought it could.

review_title: Our new firewall solution
description: We have deployed over 1/2 dozen thus far with no issues at all.
author: Anthony C.
pros: The ease of deployment and features for an affordable monthly cost are unbeatable.
cons: The software is great, wish there were different hardware options on some models. SSD on all I say :- )
